the UX of pc configure is shit -- I want to be able to be able to select the provider (openrouter, ollama, etc) with tabs instead of a long list

Clean build (only pre-existing warnings). Both changes are in:

**Provider tabs:** `[` / `]` cycle through All / Claude CLI / OpenRouter / Ollama tabs at the top of the models pane, filtering the list to that provider. Each tab shows a live count; the active one is highlighted cyan-on-black.

**Role descriptions:** bumped the info area from 3 → 6 lines and switched from `truncate_to` to `Paragraph::wrap`, so descriptions and suggestions now word-wrap instead of being cut off.
